prompts.intro: You have just joined a new sports club. Write an email to your English friend Sam.
bullets: invite Sam to come with you
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Sam,

I have joined a football club near my house. I joined because I want to get fit and meet new friends. The training is on Saturday mornings.

Would you like to come with me next week? It is really fun!

See you soon,
Alex

prompts.intro: You went to a school trip last week. Write an email to your English friend Jamie.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jamie,

Last week my class went to the science museum in the city. We saw many interesting machines and did some experiments. I liked the space exhibition best because the photos of planets were amazing.

Wish you were there!

Best,
Mia

prompts.intro: You want to organise a picnic with your friends. Write an email to your English friend Taylor.
bullets: when and where you want to have the picnic
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Taylor,

I want to organise a picnic in the park on Saturday afternoon. Can you bring some sandwiches and juice? I will make a salad.

We can play games and listen to music. Please ask your brother to come too!

See you soon,
Rio

prompts.intro: You started learning a new hobby. Write an email to your English friend Jordan.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jordan,

I have started learning to play the guitar! My uncle gave me his old guitar and now I take lessons every Thursday. It is difficult but very exciting.

Do you have any hobbies? I would love to know!

Best wishes,
Sofia

prompts.intro: You are going to a birthday party next weekend. Write an email to your English friend Casey.
bullets: what you are going to do at the party
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Casey,

My friend Pablo is having a birthday party on Saturday. We are going to eat pizza, watch a film and play music. It will be at his house from 5 pm.

Would you like to come? Everyone is welcome!

See you,
Lena

prompts.intro: You recently read a great book. Write an email to your English friend Morgan.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Morgan,

I just finished a book called 'The Lost Island'. It is about two teenagers who find a secret island during their summer holiday. I loved it because it was very exciting and funny.

You should read it! I think you will enjoy it.

Take care,
Nia

prompts.intro: You are going on a school trip abroad next month. Write an email to your English friend Riley.
bullets: how long you will be away
what you are looking forward to
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Riley,

I am going on a school trip to Paris next month! We will be away for four days. I am really looking forward to seeing the Eiffel Tower and trying French food.

I will send you photos!

Bye for now,
Kai

prompts.intro: You saw a great film last night. Write an email to your English friend Avery.
bullets: ask Avery to watch it too
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Avery,

I watched a fantastic film last night with my sister. It was a comedy about a group of students who start a band. We laughed a lot!

You should watch it this weekend. I am sure you will love it.

Best,
Pia

prompts.intro: Your school has a new computer room. Write an email to your English friend Dakota.
bullets: what is new in the room
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Dakota,

Our school just opened a new computer room with 30 fast computers and a big screen. Students use it for research and also to learn to code. I think it is really useful and it is much better than our old one.

Do you have something like this at your school?

Write back soon,
Sam

prompts.intro: You are helping to organise a school fair. Write an email to your English friend Remy.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Remy,

Our school fair is on the 15th of next month. There will be food stalls, games and a talent show. It starts at 10 am and finishes at 4 pm.

Would you like to help us prepare? We need more people to work at the food stall.

Hope to see you there,
Blake

prompts.intro: You have just got a new pet. Write an email to your English friend Chris.
bullets: what kind of pet you have
ask Chris if they have a pet
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Chris,

I have a new pet! My parents gave me a small rabbit last weekend. She is white with brown spots and her name is Coco. She is very friendly and loves to eat carrots.

Do you have any pets? I would love to hear about them!

Bye for now,
Teo

prompts.intro: You tried a new restaurant last weekend. Write an email to your English friend Alex.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Alex,

Last Saturday I went to a new Italian restaurant near the city centre with my family. I had pasta with tomato sauce and it was delicious! The restaurant is not expensive and the service was very friendly.

You should go there sometime. I am sure you will like it!

Take care,
Iris

prompts.intro: You won a prize at school. Write an email to your English friend Lee.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Lee,

I have some exciting news! I won first prize in our school art competition. I painted a picture of my town and my teacher chose it as the best one. My prize was a set of new art pencils.

I was so surprised and happy! I could not stop smiling all day.

Write soon,
Nova

prompts.intro: You visited a new city during the holidays. Write an email to your English friend Jess.
bullets: what you liked most about it
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jess,

During the holidays I visited Lisbon with my parents. We walked around the old part of the city and visited a castle on a hill. The views were amazing! I also tried some local pastries which were really tasty.

I liked the castle most because it was so beautiful. Have you ever been to Portugal?

Best wishes,
Marcus

prompts.intro: You are learning to cook. Write an email to your English friend Billie.
bullets: what you have learned to cook
invite Billie to try your cooking
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Billie,

I have started learning to cook with my mum. Last week I made a vegetable soup and some pancakes. My mum says I am getting better every day!

Why don't you come to my house on Saturday? I can cook lunch for us. I think you will enjoy it!

See you soon,
Dani

prompts.intro: You went to a great sports match. Write an email to your English friend Pat.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Pat,

I went to a basketball match at the sports centre yesterday with my dad. Our local team played against a team from another city. It was a very close game but our team won in the last minute!

I was so excited I was jumping and shouting. It was the best match I have ever seen!

Cheers,
Finn

prompts.intro: You are going to a music concert next week. Write an email to your English friend Rosa.
bullets: which band or singer you will see
ask Rosa to come with you
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Rosa,

I am going to a concert next Friday! My favourite pop singer is performing at the big arena in the city centre. I have wanted to see her for a long time.

I have an extra ticket. Would you like to come with me? It will be a fantastic night!

Let me know soon,
Gia

prompts.intro: You have just started a part-time job. Write an email to your English friend Drew.
bullets: what you like about the job
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Drew,

I have some exciting news! I started a part-time job at a bakery near my house. I work on Saturday and Sunday mornings from 8 to 12. I help serve customers and arrange the bread and cakes.

I really like it because I meet lots of interesting people and I earn some pocket money!

Best,
Oliver

prompts.intro: You made a new friend at school. Write an email to your English friend Sam.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Sam,

I want to tell you about my new friend! Her name is Celia and she joined my class last month. We met during a group project in science and we talked a lot. She is very funny and kind.

We have already been to the cinema together and we go for walks after school. I think you would like her!

Talk soon,
Amy

prompts.intro: You are going on a family holiday soon. Write an email to your English friend Noel.
bullets: what you plan to do there
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Noel,

My family is going on holiday to the coast next month! We are travelling by car and it will take about three hours. We have rented a small house near the beach.

I plan to swim every day and we are also going to visit an old lighthouse nearby. I am really looking forward to it!

See you when I get back,
Luca

prompts.intro: You received a gift you really liked. Write an email to your English friend Sky.
bullets: why you liked it so much
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Sky,

I received an amazing gift last week! My grandparents gave me a new camera for my birthday. It is small but takes very good photos.

I love it because I enjoy taking pictures of nature and my friends. I have already taken more than a hundred photos! It is the best present I have ever had.

Write back soon,
Eva

prompts.intro: You tried a new sport for the first time. Write an email to your English friend Max.
bullets: whether you want to do it again
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Max,

I tried rock climbing for the first time last Saturday! My school organised a trip to an indoor climbing centre. I was a little nervous at first but the instructor was very helpful.

I managed to reach the top of the wall and it felt fantastic. I definitely want to go again. Have you ever tried it?

Take care,
Ruby

prompts.intro: You are having a party at your home. Write an email to your English friend Jamie.
bullets: why you are having the party
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jamie,

I am having a party at my house next Saturday to celebrate the end of the school year! We are going to have music, dancing and a barbecue in the garden. My mum is making a big cake too.

It starts at 4 pm. Please come! It will be a great evening.

Hope to see you,
Carlo

prompts.intro: You visited a famous place in your country. Write an email to your English friend Tess.
bullets: what you did or saw there
what you thought of the visit
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Tess,

Last weekend I visited an old castle in our region with my school. We walked through the big rooms and learned about the history of the place. There was also a beautiful garden with flowers and a fountain.

I thought it was really interesting and I took lots of photos. I think you would enjoy it if you came to visit me!

Best wishes,
Hana

prompts.intro: You have started learning to play a musical instrument. Write an email to your English friend Cole.
bullets: ask Cole if they play any instrument
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Cole,

I have started learning to play the piano! I have lessons every Tuesday with a teacher from my neighbourhood. It is quite difficult but I can already play a few simple songs.

My family enjoys listening to me practise, which makes me happy. Do you play any instruments? I would love to know!

Write back,
Zara

prompts.intro: You are moving to a new house. Write an email to your English friend Leo.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Leo,

I have some big news! My family is moving to a new house next month. It is in a quiet street near a park and it has a big garden. My new bedroom is larger than my old one, which I really like.

I feel a little sad to leave my old neighbourhood but I am also excited about the new place. I hope you can come and visit soon!

See you,
Nate

prompts.intro: You spent a weekend in the countryside. Write an email to your English friend Bea.
bullets: how it was different from your normal weekend
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Bea,

Last weekend I went to a small village in the mountains with my family. We went hiking in the hills and had a picnic by a river. In the evening we had dinner at a small local restaurant.

It was very different from my usual weekends in the city. There was no noise and the air was so clean and fresh. I felt very relaxed! Have you ever spent time in the countryside?

Hugs,
Clara

prompts.intro: Your school has just got a new sports field. Write an email to your English friend Theo.
bullets: what the new sports field is like
what sports you can play on it
what you think of the new facility
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Theo,

Our school just opened a new sports field and it is amazing! It has a large grass area for football and a running track around it. There are also new changing rooms and seats for spectators.

We can play football, do athletics and have school sports days there. I think it is fantastic and it makes PE lessons much more fun!

Best,
Milo

prompts.intro: You baked something for the first time. Write an email to your English friend Jade.
bullets: offer to bake something for Jade
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Jade,

I baked chocolate cookies for the first time yesterday! I followed a simple recipe online and my mum helped me a little. They came out really well and my whole family loved them.

I was so proud! Next time you come to visit, I can bake some for you too. I think you will love them!

Talk soon,
Freya

prompts.intro: You went to a farmers' market last weekend. Write an email to your English friend Ben.
prompts.sampleResponse:
Hi Ben,

Last Saturday I went to a farmers' market in the town square with my dad. There were lots of stalls selling fresh vegetables, homemade bread, cheese and honey. We bought strawberries and a jar of local honey.

I really enjoyed it because everything looked so colourful and fresh. The people were very friendly too. You should come next time it is on!

Cheers,
Rory
